title: Episode 2: Jake's Bad Day（Jake的糟糕日）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 搬来一周，去还Jake工具，发现他状态很差——被裁员了。你陪他、煮咖啡、帮他查怎么申请补助。
steps.text_cn: （搬来一周，去还Jake工具，发现他状态很差——被裁员了。你陪他、煮咖啡、帮他查怎么申请补助。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: One week later, you go to return Jake's tool. When he opens the door, he looks tired and upset.
steps.text_cn: （一周后，你去还Jake的工具。他开门时，看起来又累又低落。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 一周后。你拿着上次借的工具去敲Jake的门。
steps.text_cn: （一周后。你拿着上次借的工具去敲Jake的门。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Jake开门。看起来很累，眼睛红红的。家里很乱。
steps.text_cn: （Jake开门。看起来很累，眼睛红红的。家里很乱。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 他明显状态不好。你想关心他。
steps.text_cn: （他明显状态不好。你想关心他。）

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Hey Jake, I'm returning your tool.

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Oh. Hey. Thanks... just put it there.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目1
Jake looks upset. You want to check on him. What do you say?

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 他明显不想一个人待着。你没有走。
steps.text_cn: （他明显不想一个人待着。你没有走。）

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Are you okay?

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Yeah... not really. Bad day.

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: I'll make coffee.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目2
You say "I'll make coffee." Why?

options.label: B
options.text: You want to stay and be with Jake

options.label: C
options.text: Jake asked you to make coffee

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: You stay. You make coffee instead of asking more questions. After a moment, Jake finally starts talking.
steps.text_cn: （你没有离开。你先去煮咖啡，没有继续追问。过了一会儿，Jake终于开口了。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 你在Jake的厨房泡了咖啡递给他。他终于开口了。
steps.text_cn: （你在Jake的厨房泡了咖啡递给他。他终于开口了。）

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: I lost my job. The company cut my whole team.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目3
"I lost my job" means:

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Jake笑了一下。

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Oh no... I'm sorry.

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: It's not about money... I just felt like I was doing well. And then — gone.

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Sorry. You just moved in. You don't need my problems.

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: You helped me on my first day. Now I'm here.

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Jake calms down a little. You take out your phone and start looking for practical help.
steps.text_cn: （Jake稍微冷静了一些。你拿出手机，开始帮他找实际能用的办法。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 你提议帮他查查能不能申请补助。
steps.text_cn: （你提议帮他查查能不能申请补助。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 你在手机上搜索，找到了网页。
steps.text_cn: （你在手机上搜索，找到了网页。）

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Maybe you can get help? From the government?

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Yeah... I should do that.

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Let me help you look.

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: It says... you need to apply online. And you need your ID.

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Okay. I can do that. Thanks.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目4
Match the English words with their meanings:

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Hey. Thanks. For real.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目5
Jake says "Thanks. For real." You want to say: that's what neighbors do — we help each other. Best response?

options.label: A
options.text: "You're welcome, please don't bother me again."

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: The next day, Jake seems a little stronger. But his last message shows he's still worried about what could happen next.
steps.text_cn: （第二天，Jake看起来振作了一些。但他最后那条消息说明，他心里还是很担心接下来会发生什么。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 第二天，群消息：

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Jake私信你：

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: That's what neighbors are for.

steps.speaker: Jake:** _(笑)_ "You sound like Mrs. H."_第二天，群消息：_**Jake
steps.text: Started looking for new jobs today. 💪

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: So proud of you dear!

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Thanks again. Also — if I can't find a job... I'm scared. Mrs. H's son lost his job too. That's why he had to leave.

steps.instruction:
题目6
Jake wants to tell someone: I lost my job last week.

options.label: A
options.text: I lost my job last week.

steps.instruction:
题目7
Your friend looks sad. You want to check on them. Say:
